arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘are in pole position’ to sign player despite Barcelona making efforts
arts.sum: Arsenal ‘are in pole position’ to sign goalkeeper Joan García from Espanyol despite Barcelona making efforts to sign him. That’s according to Cadena SER, who report that Barcelona have asked about the goalkeeper’s release clause but could be beaten by Arsenal. arts.ttl: How FC Barcelona could line-up for Benfica Champions League clash
arts.sum: With a slender 1-0 advantage from the first leg in Lisbon last week, Hansi Flick will field his strongest possible Barça XI this Tuesday at home against Benfica . Barcelona’s game last Saturday against Osasuna was suspended due to the sudden death of club doctor Carles Miñarro and after the UCL test, the Catalan’s face Atletico Madrid on Sunday in LaLiga before the international break.
